tensor_core.description: Ampere Tensor Core supporting FP16, BF16, TF32, and mixed-precision operations.

bottleneck_analysis.bottleneck: Limited matrix dimension granularity and precision conversion overhead in TF32/BF16 modes.
bottleneck_analysis.description: Tensor Cores on Ampere are optimized for 16×16×16 tile sizes. When matrix dimensions don’t align perfectly, additional conversion and accumulation steps reduce effective utilization of the tensor compute pipeline.
bottleneck_analysis.workload_characteristic: Mixed-precision GEMMs in transformer blocks where tensors don’t align to 16×16 tile sizes—under-utilizing tensor-core pipelines and causing extra casting/accumulation latency.
